demographics.living_situation: lives with a sibling who is present and helping

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The pain under my right ribs started after dinner last night and it hasn't stopped; now I'm shivering and can't keep water down.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain has gone on for about 10 hours without letting up, I've got a fever and chills, and I keep throwing up — it's much worse than the tummy attacks I've had before.

symptom_narrative.onset: started roughly 10 hours ago, not long after a big, rich dinner last night
symptom_narrative.duration: constant for about 10 hours and hasn't eased at all
symptom_narrative.character: a deep, steady, gripping ache — not coming in waves like before, it just stays
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe, one of the worst pains I've had; I'm staying in bed and moving very carefully because jolting it hurts
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: high up on the right side of my tummy, under the ribs, and it bores through to my right shoulder blade
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: continuous — it hasn't come and gone the way my past attacks did
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing has helped; I took some paracetamol overnight but I threw it straight back up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving around, and it started after a heavy fatty meal
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: lots of nausea, I keep vomiting and it's greenish/bile-looking, I've gone right off food, and since early this morning I've had a fever and shivering
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had similar right-side tummy attacks before but they always settled by themselves within a couple of hours — this one is different, it won't stop and I never had a fever with them
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bedbound, can't keep any fluids down, worried about getting dehydrated

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recurrent short-lived right-upper tummy attacks after fatty food in the past that settled on their own
past_medical_history.how_managed: just waited them out at home; never needed hospital before

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: took some overnight for the pain but vomited it back up

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: sibling is at the bedside and can help with transport if needed

objective_data_offered.value: I feel really hot and I keep getting the shivers, started early this morning
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective fever sensation, not a measured temperature

objective_data_offered.value: the vomit is greenish and looks like bile; there's a bowl of it by the bed
she looks flushed and unwell, lying still in bed and holding the right side of her tummy, wincing when she shifts
